title: [ARCH] Define foundational architecture: tech stack, folder structure, naming conventions, and key patterns

conversation_log.summary: Task correctly fills the architectural gap. Notes: (1) list packages/contracts/ in folder structure, (2) call out strict mode in Key Patterns, (3) confirm @cv-tool/ scope applies to all workspaces.
Re-reviewed — prior approval unchanged. Architecture docs confirmed still template-only. Three notes must be incorporated.
Final architect approval with label transition to tester. Task defines the architecture (no conflicts possible). Three notes reiterated.
All three acceptance criteria are testable as written. Architect notes covered by criterion 1.
Both docs populated on branch task/16-foundational-architecture-docs. All architect notes incorporated. PR blocked by git history issue — flagged for human operator.

Post-implementation architectural review. architecture.md on main is fully populated with all six sections: Overview, Tech Stack, Structure, Naming Conventions, Key Patterns, External Integrations. All three prior architect notes incorporated (packages/contracts/, strict:true, @cv-tool/ scope for all workspaces). Content is architecturally sound and consistent with Epic #2. tech-decisions.md still shows template-only on main — branch merge pending (git history issue reported by developer). Task is approved; awaiting PR/merge for tech-decisions.md.

10/14 tests passed. Criterion 1 (architecture.md — all six sections): PASSED (7/7 tests). Criterion 3 (no application code modified): PASSED (2/2 tests). Criterion 2 (tech-decisions.md — four ADRs): FAILED (0/4 tests). docs/tech-decisions.md is still template-only on main — the branch task/16-foundational-architecture-docs containing the ADRs has not been merged due to the git history issue reported by the developer. All four ADRs (Turborepo choice, @cv-tool/ scoped naming, TypeScript-only policy, folder structure layout) are missing from the file on main.
